metadata.description: Daniele Dal Grande's Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: feedback-loops
plugins.description: Self-verification feedback loops: detect a project's checks once, then run run→observe→fix until green before declaring done.

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Delivery loop: take a green change out the door — feature branch → rebase (re-verify when the base moved) → /code-review → push → PR → watch — with an opt-in, fail-open Stop-hook gate that enforces delivery state only (never runs your lint/tests).
